meta.title: Sardunya Girls' Dormitory | Çanakkale
meta.description: The safest and most comfortable girls' dormitory in Çanakkale. Offering students a peaceful living environment with 14 years of experience.

hero.title: Sardunya
hero.subtitle: Girls' Dormitory
hero.sub: Build your future in safe, comfortable and modern living spaces. In the heart of Çanakkale, just 3 minutes walk from campus.
hero.pensionNote: Pension accommodation is available for families during summer.

certsSection.label: Documents & Certificates
certsSection.title: Proof of Our Reliability
certsSection.sub: We provide the safest living environment for our students with documents meeting all standards.

serviceItems.title: Unlimited Internet
serviceItems.desc: Enjoy uninterrupted internet access with unlimited and high-speed Wi-Fi.

serviceItems.title: 24/7 Hot Water
serviceItems.desc: Continuous hot water available around the clock.

serviceItems.title: Natural Gas Heating
serviceItems.desc: Central natural gas heating system operating 24/7 during winter.

serviceItems.title: Earthquake Safety
serviceItems.desc: Your safety matters — our building is designed in compliance with earthquake regulations.

serviceItems.title: Open Buffet Breakfast
serviceItems.desc: A delicious breakfast you won't miss from home. Weekend late breakfast option available.

serviceItems.title: Summer Pension Service
serviceItems.desc: Pension accommodation service is available for families during summer periods.

serviceItems.title: Study Hall
serviceItems.desc: A quiet environment where you can easily prepare for your lessons and exams.

serviceItems.title: Internet Lounge
serviceItems.desc: A comfortable space where you can make the most of your internet time.

serviceItems.title: TV & Recreation Room
serviceItems.desc: A relaxing lounge where you can unwind after a long day and watch movies or series.

serviceItems.title: Fully Equipped Kitchen
serviceItems.desc: Prepare your own meals in our fully stocked kitchen with all kinds of cookware.

serviceItems.title: Free Laundry Service
serviceItems.desc: Free laundry service available for washing your clothes.

serviceItems.title: 24/7 CCTV Security
serviceItems.desc: Our dormitory is monitored by 24/7 security cameras to ensure your safety.

facilitiesSection.label: Our Facilities
facilitiesSection.title: Modern & Well-Equipped Facilities
facilitiesSection.sub: We offer modern facilities to support the academic and social development of our students.

facilityItems.title: Dining Hall
facilityItems.desc: Our spacious dining hall where you can enjoy meals ordered from our partner catering company.

facilityItems.title: Kitchen
facilityItems.desc: A 24/7 kitchen where you can prepare your own food and snacks whenever you like.

facilityItems.title: Study Hall
facilityItems.desc: A quiet and airy study room for preparing for exams or daily lessons.

facilityItems.title: Recreation Room
facilityItems.desc: A space where you can relax after a long day, watch TV and chat with friends.

regDocsSection.label: Registration
regDocsSection.title: Required Documents for Registration
regDocsSection.sub: Some documents are required to join our family and stay in our dormitory. We have listed the necessary documents for you.
items: Criminal Record from the Public Prosecutor's Office
Health report confirming suitability for dormitory accommodation
regDocsSection.note: Bringing complete documents will speed up the registration process. You can call us or fill out the pre-registration form for detailed information.

contactSection.title: How to Reach Us?

contactSection.addressShort: Cevatpaşa Mah. 1. Çanakçılar Sokak No: 18, Çanakkale

aboutSection.label: About Us
aboutSection.title: The Trusted Address of Çanakkale
aboutSection.text: Sardunya Girls' Dormitory opened at full capacity in 2011 and has since established a modern living space in Çanakkale with its quality, high standards and tolerant management approach. We believe that accommodation must fully and promptly meet the needs of students for them to have a successful university life. With this awareness, we always put the satisfaction of our valued students first.
points: A modern dormitory applying world quality standards.
We support students in making the most of their time.
A tolerant and experienced management team by your side.

footer.copy: © 2026 Sardunya Girls' Dormitory. All rights reserved.

popup.sub: Leave your information and we will call you as soon as possible.
